top_signals.title: U.S. hits Iran for ninth consecutive night as American casualties mount
top_signals.summary: The U.S. military began a ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iran, escalating a campaign aimed at destroying Tehran's ability to disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Jumps, Bonds Fall as US-Iran Attacks Escalate: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil climbed to the highest level in more than a month and bonds fell as US and Iranian attacks escalated, renewing inflation concerns. Stocks stabilized after a technology-led selloff rattled markets last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US, Iran Renew Conflict With Strikes on Bridge, Desalination Plant

top_signals.title: Wars shift focus from jets to weapons at giant Farnborough Airshow

top_signals.title: Cadeler Welcomes Wind Ace WTIV to its Fleet
top_signals.summary: Cadeler has taken delivery of Wind Ace, its 11th offshore wind turbine installation vessel (WTIV) and the second of three A-class newbuilds.Built over the past two years at the COSCO Shipping Offshore shipyard in Qidong, China, the vessel was delivered on schedule and within budget…

top_signals.title: US launches fresh Iran strikes as death toll climbs
top_signals.summary: A service member died in a ‘controlled detonation’ of a drone after two soldiers were killed in Jordan with another missing
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What Are Mineral Rights? The Complete Guide to Owning, Leasing and Selling Them
top_signals.summary: Millions of Americans own oil and gas mineral rights and have no real idea what that means. Some inherited a folder of yellowed documents from a grandparent's estate. Some bought a piece of land and assumed everything under it came with the deed. Some get a small check in the mail every few months and couldn't explain why if asked. Mineral rights are one of the most valuable and least understood assets in the country, and a whole industry has built itself around that gap in knowledge. Landmen, mineral buyers and self-styled "finders" all make a…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: India Proposes Stricter Vehicle Emission Rules To Cut Oil Consumption
top_signals.summary: The Indian government has proposed stricter fuel efficiency regulations for passenger vehicles under the Corporate Average Fuel Efficiency (CAFE)-III norms, with the new fuel standards set to take effect on April 1, 2027. Released by the Ministry of Power for public consultation, these rules aim to lower vehicular emissions, decrease reliance on imported crude oil, and shrink the nation's rising oil import bill.  To capture real-world emissions accurately, the framework will transition from the Modified Indian Driving Cycle (MIDC) to the more…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
